criteria.description: Collapsed .triage-io-styled exclusion box (pattern input + Apply + Clear) renders under the site-inventory meta line on the landing page and on the accessibility page
criteria.evidence:
exclusionBox() emitted in bugReportsSection (accessibility, WP02) and renderDomainReport directly under the inventory

(WP03); render tests assert box present + ordering after the inventory line. WP03.

criteria.description: Patterns match the full URL case-insensitively as substring or /regex/; # comments and blank lines ignored
criteria.evidence: exclusionFilterScript() compile()/parse() mirror compileExclusionPattern; Playwright drive confirmed /medicare/ substring filtering; # comments/blank lines dropped in parse(). WP02.

criteria.description: Active list persists in localStorage['vital-exclude:<domain-key>'] (per-domain) and re-applies on load with no re-entry
criteria.evidence: exclusionFilterScript() loadRaw/saveRaw on 'vital-exclude:'+data-domain-key; Playwright reload confirmed the list persists and re-applies with the textarea prefilled. WP02.

criteria.description: With a list active, matching findings/pages are hidden and all visible counts update to the filtered view, client-side
criteria.evidence: Playwright: all-excluded finding hidden, mixed finding kept with matched <li> hidden, bug-filter 'Showing N of M' total drops via data-excluded + window.__vitalApplyFilter. WP02.

criteria.description: Viewer list is additive to the config url_exclude_patterns baseline; banner names both sources with a hidden-count and reset-to-view-all
criteria.evidence: Server still applies filterBugsByExclusion(config baseline) then the viewer script adds on top (additive); config banner (formatExclusionBanner) + dynamic #exclude-banner with hidden count and a 'View everything' reset. WP02.

criteria.description: Export (.json) / Import (.json) / Copy share payload work, carrying the domain key, reusing the triage IO scaffold
criteria.evidence: exclusionBox() adds Export/Import/Copy controls; exclusionFilterScript() handlers build {type:'vital-exclude',domain,exported,patterns}. Playwright round-trip: export (comment lines dropped) → clear → import re-applies + prefills textarea; copy-share writes valid JSON to the clipboard; import warns on domain mismatch. WP04.

criteria.description: matchesExclusionPattern / filterBugsByExclusion honour /regex/ as well as substrings; invalid regex falls back to literal substring; config-baseline behaviour unchanged
criteria.evidence: src/report-html.js compileExclusionPattern()/matchesExclusionPattern()/filterBugsByExclusion(); tests/unit/url-exclusion.test.js (6 cases: substring case-insensitive, /regex/ match, flag honoured, invalid-regex fallback, filter recompute, full-exclusion). WP01.

criteria.description: Docs updated: CLAUDE.md three-layer note, README/FEATURES bullet, targets.yml cross-reference
Progressive enhancement: JS-off renders the full server report (config baseline applied); the viewer control/filter/IO never break the no-JS baseline
criteria.evidence: Box rendered hidden and revealed only by exclusionFilterScript; findings ship data-excluded="" (never pre-hidden); render test asserts both findings present with no data-excluded="1" in static HTML. WP02.

criteria.description: Headline score/grade stays whole-site (not recomputed for the filtered subset); filtered view is labelled
criteria.evidence: Server never recomputes the score; #score-scope-note (hidden) is revealed by the script only when exclusions are active. Playwright confirmed the note appears on the landing page with /medicare/ active. WP03.

criteria.description: One canonical location per finding preserved; hiding is display filtering only, no re-render elsewhere
criteria.evidence: Filtering toggles element.hidden / data-excluded on the existing accessibility-page finding blocks; no finding re-rendered elsewhere. WP02.

criteria.description: Sustainable web output: reuse .triage-io/existing CSS, no web fonts, gated no-op-when-empty script, within the lean budget
criteria.evidence: Reuses .triage-io-status + minimal .exclude-* CSS (~12 lines); one script, returns early when #exclude-box absent and no-ops when the stored list is empty; no web fonts, no network. WP02.

criteria.description: No data/state/API changes; deep links and #fragment anchors keep working; JSON API keyed on domain/week untouched
No new npm runtime dependencies; Node ESM >= 20, no build step
Severity taxonomy unchanged (internal keys critical/serious/moderate/minor; four display labels)
criteria.evidence: Exclusion layer adds no severity strings; render test asserts class="bug sev-critical" internal key preserved. WP02.

criteria.description: i18n lockstep: new visible strings via t(); script templates injected per-locale via JSON.stringify(t()); i18n:check green
criteria.evidence: All new box/banner/script strings via t(); script message templates injected as JSON.stringify(t(...)); npm run i18n:extract → template.json 571 strings; i18n:check clean. WP02.

criteria.description: Unit tests cover regex-aware filter (substring/regex/invalid fallback) and control+banner render/inert-when-empty; e2e/i18n hrefs updated in lockstep
Net added CSS/JS within budget; reuses .triage-io + existing IO script; filter script emitted once per page and a no-op when no list stored
criteria.evidence: Reuses .triage-btn/.triage-io-status + existing Export/Import/'Copy share payload' catalog strings; ~12 lines new CSS; one script per page, returns early without #exclude-box and no-ops on an empty list. WP04.
